          +--------------------+
          |  Response Builder  |
          +--------------------+
                     ^
+--------------------o-----------------------+
|                    |                       |
|          +---------+---------+             |
|          |                   |             |
|   /------+-----\             |             |
|   |  Order DB  |             |             |
|   \------------/             |             |
|          ^                   |             |
|----------o-------------------o---+         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
| +--------+--------+    /-----+-----\       |
| |  Order Service  |    |  User DB  |       |
| +-----------------+    \-----------/       |
|          ^                   ^   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          |                   |   |         |
|          +---------+---------+   |         |
|                    |             |         |
|           +--------+-------+     |         |
|           |  User Service  |     |         |
|           +----------------+     |         |
|                    ^             |         |
|                    |             |         |
|                    ++            |         |
|[  Service Layer  ]-oo------------+         |
|                    ++                      |
+[  Data Layer  ]----o-----------------------+
                     |
             +-------+-------+
             |  API Gateway  |
             +---------------+
